text:
qmmp 0.7.3 and qmmp-plugin-pack 0.7.3 had been released.
I generate a patch to the current ports for upgrading to
the latest versions, please ignore the former attached
patch files.

It is very sad that my former Google account
<liangtai.s4@gmail.com> was banned for uncertain reason.

SimaMoto,RyoTa
https://github.com/liangtai/FreeBSD-ports
